payload.answer: I can offer repair/user-choice options for how to handle this as a memory candidate, but I won’t commit any durable memory from it directly.
repair_options: Keep this as a one-time conversational topic only; do not store as memory.
Store as a tentative interest in knowledge graphs, if you want this remembered later.
Ask a clarifying question to distinguish between a temporary curiosity and an ongoing learning goal.
Record it separately from any broader topics like AI, graph databases, or semantic search, rather than merging it.
